description:
Spotify to Teams Status Sync

Automatically syncs your currently playing Spotify track to your Microsoft Teams status message. Set a custom status message using placeholders like {artist}, {track}, {album}, and {emoji}.
What's Changed
- deps(npm): pin cookie >= 0.7.0 via package.json overrides (GHSA-pxg6-pf52-xh8x) by @Carme99 in #113
- security(ci): switch homebrew job to credential helper, document 90-day PAT rotation (#68) by @Carme99 in #114
- refactor(frontend): type the 5 invoke / listen call sites (#78 part 1) by @Carme99 in #116
- refactor: error handling — drop eprintln! + severity field + frontend gating (#79) by @Carme99 in #117
- refactor: extract OnboardingCache sub-struct with lock encapsulation (#80 step 1) by @Carme99 in #118
- chore(release): bump version to 2.7.4 by @Carme99 in #119
Full Changelog: v2.7.3...v2.7.4
